mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cv_skills (cv_id, skill_category, skill_name, skill_level, display_order) VALUES (#{cvId}, #{item.skillCategory}, #{item.skillName}, #{item.skillLevel}, #{item.displayOrder})

INSERT INTO cv_educations (cv_id, school_name, major, degree, gpa, description, start_date, end_date) VALUES (#{cvId}, #{item.schoolName}, #{item.major}, #{item.degree}, #{item.gpa}, #{item.description}, #{item.startDate}, #{item.endDate})

INSERT INTO cv_projects (cv_id, project_name, company_name, team_size, role_in_project, tech_frontend, tech_backend, tech_devops_tools, url_demo, start_date, end_date) VALUES (#{cvId}, #{item.projectName}, #{item.companyName}, #{item.teamSize}, #{item.roleInProject}, #{item.techFrontend}, #{item.techBackend}, #{item.techDevopsTools}, #{item.urlDemo}, #{item.startDate}, #{item.endDate})
INSERT INTO cv_interests (cv_id, interest_name, display_order) VALUES (#{cvId}, #{item.interestName}, #{item.displayOrder})

INSERT INTO cv_certifications (cv_id, cert_name, issuing_organization, issue_date, expiration_date, credential_id, credential_url) VALUES (#{cvId}, #{item.certName}, #{item.issuingOrganization}, #{item.issueDate}, #{item.expirationDate}, #{item.credentialId}, #{item.credentialUrl})
INSERT INTO cv_activities (cv_id, organization, role, description, start_date, end_date) VALUES (#{cvId}, #{item.organization}, #{item.role}, #{item.description}, #{item.startDate}, #{item.endDate})
